---
title: "CVlization"
subtitle: "Curated AI Training and Inference Recipes That Just Work"
---

190+ state-of-the-art open source AI capabilities, packaged in self-contained
Docker environments. Find a recipe, test it, copy what you need.

## Featured Projects

### [Optical Music Recognition](projects/omr/index.qmd)

Fine-tuning Vision-Language Models to transcribe sheet music images into symbolic
notation. We developed MXC (MusicXML Compact) to compress training targets 12x,
then tested 6 VLMs across multiple LoRA ranks and training configurations.

Current best: 35% pitched-only similarity using Qwen3.5-9B r=32 on 3K lieder
pages. The model reads pitch from staff positions but accuracy is limited by
training data size.

## Repository

- **Code**: [github.com/kungfuai/CVlization](https://github.com/kungfuai/CVlization)
- **Datasets**: [huggingface.co/zzsi](https://huggingface.co/zzsi)
